message:
refactor(huh): Migrate FormError to thiserror (charmed_rust-1bh)

Replaces manual Display and Error implementations with thiserror derives,
following the unified error pattern from the error handling guide.

Changes:
- Add thiserror dependency to huh crate
- Replace FormError with thiserror-based implementation
- Add helper methods: validation(), io(), is_user_abort(), is_timeout(), is_recoverable()
- Maintain Clone + PartialEq + Eq for testing compatibility
- Keep Io variant as String (not io::Error) to preserve trait requirements

All 27 tests pass, Display output unchanged.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
